---
title: "MC1R Replication Analysis"
author: "Jackson G. Schumacher"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
---

<!-- Produces: Figure 2 (replication motor decline), Supplemental Table 10 (replication
     demographics), and replication supplemental diagnostic figures (slope
     distribution, slope vs. time to treatment, attrition) -->
<!-- Manuscript: Schumacher et al., Common MC1R variants and Parkinson disease progression -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
set.seed(10719L)
```

```{r packages}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(nlme)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r config}
config <- list(
  sure3_combined_path  = "Data/SurePD3_Combined_Analysis.csv",
  sure2_combined_path  = "Data/SurePD_Combined_Analysis.csv",
  steady_combined_path = "Data/SteadyPD3_Combined_Analysis.csv",
  output_dir           = "Output"
)
if (!dir.exists(config$output_dir)) dir.create(config$output_dir)

subscore_vars <- c("bradykinesia_score", "rigidity_score", "tremor_score",
                   "bulbar_score", "axial_score")

SUBSCORE_ITEMS <- list(
  bradykinesia_score = c(
    "code_upd2304a_right_finger_tapping", "code_upd2304b_left_finger_tapping",
    "code_upd2305a_right_hand_movements", "code_upd2305b_left_hand_movements",
    "code_upd2306a_pron_sup_movement_right_hand", "code_upd2306b_pron_sup_movement_left_hand",
    "code_upd2307a_right_toe_tapping", "code_upd2307b_left_toe_tapping",
    "code_upd2308a_right_leg_agility", "code_upd2308b_left_leg_agility",
    "code_upd2309_arising_from_chair", "code_upd2314_body_bradykinesia"),
  rigidity_score = c(
    "code_upd2303a_rigidity_neck", "code_upd2303b_rigidity_rt_upper_extremity",
    "code_upd2303c_rigidity_left_upper_extremity", "code_upd2303d_rigidity_rt_lower_extremity",
    "code_upd2303e_rigidity_left_lower_extremity"),
  tremor_score = c(
    "code_upd2315a_postural_tremor_of_right_hand", "code_upd2315b_postural_tremor_of_left_hand",
    "code_upd2316a_kinetic_tremor_of_right_hand", "code_upd2316b_kinetic_tremor_of_left_hand",
    "code_upd2317a_rest_tremor_amplitude_right_upper_extremity",
    "code_upd2317b_rest_tremor_amplitude_left_upper_extremity",
    "code_upd2317c_rest_tremor_amplitude_right_lower_extremity",
    "code_upd2317d_rest_tremor_amplitude_left_lower_extremity",
    "code_upd2317e_rest_tremor_amplitude_lip_or_jaw",
    "code_upd2318_consistency_of_rest_tremor"),
  bulbar_score = c("code_upd2301_speech_problems", "code_upd2302_facial_expression"),
  axial_score  = c("code_upd2309_arising_from_chair", "code_upd2310_gait",
                   "code_upd2311_freezing_of_gait", "code_upd2312_postural_stability",
                   "code_upd2313_posture")
)
```

## Helpers

```{r fns}
calc_pct_diff <- function(beta_diff, ref_slope) {
  if (is.na(beta_diff) || is.na(ref_slope) || ref_slope == 0) return(NA_real_)
  round(100 * beta_diff / abs(ref_slope), 1)
}

format_pval <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("")
  if (p < 0.001) return("<0.001")
  sprintf("%.3f", p)
}

safe_lme <- function(formula, data, random, weights = NULL, ...) {
  ctrl <- lmeControl(msMaxIter = 1000, msMaxEval = 1000, opt = "optim")

  try_fit <- function(fml, rnd, dat, wts = NULL) {
    result <- tryCatch({
      if (!is.null(wts)) {
        mod <- nlme::lme(fixed = fml, random = rnd, data = dat,
                         weights = wts, control = ctrl, na.action = na.omit, ...)
      } else {
        mod <- nlme::lme(fixed = fml, random = rnd, data = dat,
                         control = ctrl, na.action = na.omit, ...)
      }
      s <- summary(mod)  # catches deferred singularity
      mod
    }, warning = function(w) {
      if (grepl("singular|backsolve", w$message, ignore.case = TRUE)) return(NULL)
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    result
  }

  if (!is.null(weights)) {
    mod <- try_fit(formula, random, data, weights)
    if (!is.null(mod)) return(list(model = mod, success = TRUE, error = NULL, note = "varIdent"))
  }

  mod <- try_fit(formula, random, data)
  if (!is.null(mod)) return(list(model = mod, success = TRUE, error = NULL,
                                  note = if (!is.null(weights)) "no varIdent" else NULL))

  mod <- try_fit(formula, ~ 1 | participant_id, data)
  if (!is.null(mod)) return(list(model = mod, success = TRUE, error = NULL, note = "intercept only"))

  list(model = NULL, success = FALSE, error = "All model tiers failed (singularity)", note = NULL)
}

safe_subscore_fit <- function(fml, data) {
  ctrl <- lmeControl(opt = "optim", maxIter = 500, msMaxIter = 500)

  mod <- tryCatch(
    withCallingHandlers({
      m <- lme(fml, random = ~ visit_year | participant_id, data = data, control = ctrl)
      summary(m)  # force evaluation to catch deferred errors
      m
    }, warning = function(w) {
      if (grepl("singular|backsolve", w$message, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    }),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(mod)) return(mod)

  # intercept only
  tryCatch(
    withCallingHandlers({
      m <- lme(fml, random = ~ 1 | participant_id, data = data, control = ctrl)
      summary(m)
      m
    }, warning = function(w) {
      if (grepl("singular|backsolve", w$message, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    }),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

extract_lme_slopes <- function(model_result, reference, data) {
  if (!model_result$success) {
    return(data.frame(Group = NA, N = NA, Slope = NA, SE = NA,
                      CI_lower = NA, CI_upper = NA,
                      Beta_diff = NA, Beta_SE = NA,
                      Beta_CI_lower = NA, Beta_CI_upper = NA,
                      Pct_diff = NA, P_value = NA, Error = model_result$error))
  }
  mod <- model_result$model
  fe <- nlme::fixef(mod); vm <- vcov(mod); fe_se <- sqrt(diag(vm))
  n_per <- data %>% group_by(Cohort) %>%
    summarise(N = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")
  ref_slope <- fe["visit_year"]; ref_se <- fe_se["visit_year"]

  results <- lapply(levels(data$Cohort), function(cohort) {
    n <- n_per$N[n_per$Cohort == cohort]
    if (length(n) == 0) n <- NA

    if (cohort == reference) {
      data.frame(Group = cohort, N = n, Slope = ref_slope, SE = ref_se,
                 CI_lower = ref_slope - 1.96 * ref_se, CI_upper = ref_slope + 1.96 * ref_se,
                 Beta_diff = NA_real_, Beta_SE = NA_real_,
                 Beta_CI_lower = NA_real_, Beta_CI_upper = NA_real_,
                 Pct_diff = NA_real_, P_value = NA_real_)
    } else {
      cc <- gsub(" ", ".", cohort); cc <- gsub("\\+", ".", cc)
      nms <- c(paste0("visit_year:Cohort", cohort), paste0("visit_year:Cohort", cc),
               paste0("Cohort", cohort, ":visit_year"), paste0("Cohort", cc, ":visit_year"))
      found <- NULL
      for (nm in nms) if (nm %in% names(fe)) { found <- nm; break }

      if (!is.null(found)) {
        bd <- fe[found]; bse <- fe_se[found]
        slope <- ref_slope + bd
        var_s <- vm["visit_year","visit_year"] + vm[found,found] + 2*vm["visit_year",found]
        slope_se <- sqrt(max(0, var_s))
        pv <- tryCatch(summary(mod)$tTable[found, "p-value"], error = function(e) NA_real_)
        data.frame(Group = cohort, N = n, Slope = slope, SE = slope_se,
                   CI_lower = slope - 1.96*slope_se, CI_upper = slope + 1.96*slope_se,
                   Beta_diff = bd, Beta_SE = bse,
                   Beta_CI_lower = bd - 1.96*bse, Beta_CI_upper = bd + 1.96*bse,
                   Pct_diff = calc_pct_diff(bd, ref_slope), P_value = pv)
      } else {
        data.frame(Group = cohort, N = n, Slope = NA, SE = NA, CI_lower = NA, CI_upper = NA,
                   Beta_diff = NA, Beta_SE = NA, Beta_CI_lower = NA, Beta_CI_upper = NA,
                   Pct_diff = NA, P_value = NA)
      }
    }
  })
  do.call(rbind, results)
}

# Drop covariates with no variance (e.g. ledd_maob=0 for all in Sure-PD2)
drop_invariant_covs <- function(data, covariates) {
  keep <- vapply(covariates, function(cov) {
    if (!cov %in% names(data)) return(FALSE)
    vals <- data[[cov]][!is.na(data[[cov]])]
    length(unique(vals)) > 1
  }, logical(1))
  dropped <- covariates[!keep]
  if (length(dropped) > 0)
    cat(sprintf("  Dropped invariant covariates: %s\n", paste(dropped, collapse = ", ")))
  covariates[keep]
}

run_progression_analysis <- function(data, outcome_col, comparison,
                                      baseline_col = NULL, pooled = FALSE,
                                      med_covariate = "ledd_maob",
                                      extra_covs = NULL) {
  ad <- data %>%
    filter(Cohort %in% c(comparison$ref, comparison$test)) %>%
    mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c(comparison$ref, comparison$test)))

  if (is.null(baseline_col)) {
    ad <- ad %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      mutate(baseline_score = first(!!sym(outcome_col), order_by = visit_year)) %>%
      ungroup()
    baseline_col <- "baseline_score"
  }

  req <- c(outcome_col, "visit_year", baseline_col, "Age_onset",
           "Sex", "Race", "Cohort", "participant_id", med_covariate, extra_covs)
  if (pooled) req <- c(req, "source_cohort")

  ad <- ad %>% filter(if_all(all_of(req), ~ !is.na(.)))

  if (nrow(ad) < 20)
    return(list(success = FALSE,
                error = sprintf("Insufficient data: %d obs", nrow(ad)),
                comparison = comparison))


  all_covs <- c(baseline_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race", med_covariate, extra_covs)
  if (pooled) all_covs <- c(all_covs, "source_cohort")
  all_covs <- drop_invariant_covs(ad, all_covs)

  covs <- paste(all_covs, collapse = " + ")
  fml <- as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ visit_year * Cohort + %s", outcome_col, covs))

  mr <- safe_lme(formula = fml, data = ad,
                 random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
                 weights = nlme::varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort))

  slopes <- extract_lme_slopes(mr, comparison$ref, ad)
  slopes$Comparison <- paste(comparison$test, "vs", comparison$ref)

  list(success = mr$success, model = mr$model, slopes = slopes,
       comparison = comparison,
       n_obs = nrow(ad), n_participants = n_distinct(ad$participant_id))
}

run_subscore_analysis <- function(data, subscore_vars, comparison, label = "",
                                   pooled = FALSE, med_covariate = "ledd_maob",
                                   extra_covs = NULL) {
  results <- list()
  for (sub in subscore_vars) {
    sub_label <- gsub("_score", "", sub)
    bl_col <- paste0("baseline_", sub)

    sub_data <- data %>%
      filter(Cohort %in% c(comparison$ref, comparison$test), !is.na(.data[[sub]])) %>%
      mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c(comparison$ref, comparison$test))) %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      mutate(!!bl_col := first(.data[[sub]], order_by = visit_year)) %>%
      ungroup()

    covs <- paste(bl_col, "+ Age_onset + Sex + Race +", med_covariate)
    if (!is.null(extra_covs)) covs <- paste(covs, "+", paste(extra_covs, collapse = " + "))
    if (pooled) covs <- paste(covs, "+ source_cohort")

    req <- c(sub, "visit_year", bl_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race",
             "Cohort", "participant_id", med_covariate, extra_covs)
    if (pooled) req <- c(req, "source_cohort")
    sub_data <- sub_data %>% filter(if_all(all_of(req), ~ !is.na(.)))

    all_sub_covs <- c(bl_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race", med_covariate, extra_covs)
    if (pooled) all_sub_covs <- c(all_sub_covs, "source_cohort")
    all_sub_covs <- drop_invariant_covs(sub_data, all_sub_covs)
    covs <- paste(all_sub_covs, collapse = " + ")

    fml <- as.formula(paste0(sub, " ~ visit_year * Cohort + ", covs))

    fit <- safe_subscore_fit(fml, sub_data)

    if (!is.null(fit)) {
      fe <- nlme::fixef(fit); vm <- vcov(fit); fe_se <- sqrt(diag(vm))

      int_nm <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)
      if (length(int_nm) == 1) {
        ref_slope <- fe["visit_year"]; ref_se <- fe_se["visit_year"]
        bd <- fe[int_nm]; bse <- fe_se[int_nm]
        mc1r_slope <- ref_slope + bd
        var_mc1r <- vm["visit_year","visit_year"] + vm[int_nm,int_nm] + 2*vm["visit_year",int_nm]
        mc1r_se <- sqrt(max(0, var_mc1r))
        pv <- summary(fit)$tTable[int_nm, "p-value"]

        results[[sub_label]] <- data.frame(
          Subscore      = sub_label,
          Dataset       = label,
          N_ref  = n_distinct(sub_data$participant_id[sub_data$Cohort == comparison$ref]),
          N_MC1R = n_distinct(sub_data$participant_id[sub_data$Cohort == comparison$test]),
          N_obs  = nobs(fit),
          SPD_slope    = ref_slope, SPD_SE = ref_se,
          SPD_CI_lower = ref_slope - 1.96*ref_se, SPD_CI_upper = ref_slope + 1.96*ref_se,
          MC1R_slope    = mc1r_slope, MC1R_SE = mc1r_se,
          MC1R_CI_lower = mc1r_slope - 1.96*mc1r_se, MC1R_CI_upper = mc1r_slope + 1.96*mc1r_se,
          Diff    = bd, Diff_SE = bse,
          Diff_CI_lower = bd - 1.96*bse, Diff_CI_upper = bd + 1.96*bse,
          Pct_diff = calc_pct_diff(bd, ref_slope),
          P_value  = pv,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
  if (length(results) > 0) do.call(rbind, results)
  else data.frame()
}
```

## Data

```{r data}
sure3_combined <- read_csv(config$sure3_combined_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(visit_month = as.numeric(visit_month),
         source_cohort = "Sure-PD3")

sure2_combined <- read_csv(config$sure2_combined_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(visit_month = as.numeric(visit_month),
         source_cohort = "Sure-PD2")

steady_combined <- read_csv(config$steady_combined_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(visit_month = as.numeric(visit_month),
         source_cohort = "Steady-PD3",

         sex = if ("Sex" %in% names(.)) Sex else sex,
         ledd_maob = coalesce(as.numeric(ledd_MAO_B), 0))
```

```{r cohort-build}
compute_subscores <- function(df) {
  for (sub in names(SUBSCORE_ITEMS)) {
    items <- intersect(SUBSCORE_ITEMS[[sub]], names(df))
    if (length(items) == 0) {
      df[[sub]] <- NA_real_
    } else {
      df[[sub]] <- rowSums(
        df[, items, drop = FALSE] %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)),
        na.rm = TRUE)

      all_na <- rowSums(is.na(df[, items, drop = FALSE])) == length(items)
      df[[sub]][all_na] <- NA_real_
    }
  }
  df
}

build_analysis_data <- function(combined_df, cohort_label) {
  # Steady-PD3 uses 'Sex' not 'sex'
  if (!"sex" %in% names(combined_df) && "Sex" %in% names(combined_df)) {
    combined_df <- combined_df %>% rename(sex = Sex)
  }

  vis <- combined_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(genetic_group)) %>%
    mutate(
      on_levodopa_flag = (trimws(on_levodopa) == "Yes"),
      on_maob_flag     = (trimws(on_other_pd_medications) == "Yes"),
      on_da_flag       = if ("on_dopamine_agonist" %in% names(.))
                           coalesce(trimws(on_dopamine_agonist) == "Yes", FALSE) else FALSE
    ) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    arrange(visit_month) %>%
    mutate(
      first_levo_month = min(visit_month[on_levodopa_flag == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE),
      first_levo_month = if_else(is.infinite(first_levo_month), NA_real_, first_levo_month),
      first_da_month   = min(visit_month[on_da_flag == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE),
      first_da_month   = if_else(is.infinite(first_da_month), NA_real_, first_da_month)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      (is.na(first_levo_month) | visit_month < first_levo_month) &
      (is.na(first_da_month)   | visit_month < first_da_month)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(ledd_maob = coalesce(as.numeric(ledd_MAO_B), 0))

  vis <- vis %>%
    mutate(
      visit_year = as.numeric(visit_month) / 12,
      score      = as.numeric(mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score),
      Sex        = factor(sex, levels = c("Female", "Male")),
      Race       = factor(if_else(race == "White", "White", "Other"),
                          levels = c("White", "Other")),
      trt_actv   = as.numeric(trt_actv),
      source_cohort = cohort_label,
      Cohort = case_when(
        genetic_group == "MC1R-pure" ~ "MC1R PD",
        genetic_group == "Sporadic"  ~ "SPD",
        TRUE ~ genetic_group
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(score), !is.na(visit_year), !is.na(Age_onset)) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(baseline_score = first(score, order_by = visit_year)) %>%
    ungroup()


  has_subscores <- all(c("bradykinesia_score", "rigidity_score", "tremor_score",
                          "bulbar_score", "axial_score") %in% names(vis))
  if (!has_subscores) {
    vis <- compute_subscores(vis)
  }
  vis
}

d_sure3  <- build_analysis_data(sure3_combined, "Sure-PD3")
d_sure2  <- build_analysis_data(sure2_combined, "Sure-PD2")
d_steady <- build_analysis_data(steady_combined, "Steady-PD3")

d_pooled <- bind_rows(d_sure3, d_sure2, d_steady) %>%
  mutate(source_cohort = factor(source_cohort, levels = c("Sure-PD3", "Sure-PD2", "Steady-PD3")))
```

## Cohort Summary

```{r cohort-summary}
cohort_summary <- function(df, label) {
  pts <- df %>% filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
    distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  fu <- df %>% group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(fu = max(visit_year) - min(visit_year), .groups = "drop")

  cat(sprintf("\n%s\n", label))
  cat(sprintf("  %d pts (%d MC1R PD, %d SPD)\n",
              nrow(pts), sum(pts$Cohort == "MC1R PD"), sum(pts$Cohort == "SPD")))
  cat(sprintf("  %d visits  |  FU: median %.1f, max %.1f yr\n",
              nrow(df), median(fu$fu), max(fu$fu)))
  cat(sprintf("  onset %.1f +/- %.1f  |  %d male  |  BL UPDRS-III %.1f +/- %.1f\n",
              mean(pts$Age_onset, na.rm = TRUE), sd(pts$Age_onset, na.rm = TRUE),
              sum(pts$Sex == "Male"),
              mean(pts$baseline_score, na.rm = TRUE),
              sd(pts$baseline_score, na.rm = TRUE)))
}

cohort_summary(d_sure3,  "Sure-PD3 (pre-levodopa)")
cohort_summary(d_sure2,  "Sure-PD2 (pre-dopaminergic, Goetz-converted)")
cohort_summary(d_steady, "Steady-PD3 (pre-levodopa)")
cohort_summary(d_pooled, "Pooled (all three cohorts)")

cat("\nMAO-B use by group (Sure-PD3):\n")
d_sure3 %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
  group_by(Cohort) %>%
  summarise(n_visits = n(), n_pts = n_distinct(participant_id),
            n_on_maob = sum(ledd_maob > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_on_maob = round(100 * mean(ledd_maob > 0, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            mean_ledd_maob = round(mean(ledd_maob[ledd_maob > 0], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>% print()

cat("\nTreatment arm by group (Sure-PD3):\n")
d_sure3 %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
  distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(Cohort) %>%
  summarise(n_pts = n(), n_active = sum(trt_actv == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_active = round(100 * mean(trt_actv, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>% print()

cat("\nTreatment arm by group (Sure-PD2):\n")
d_sure2 %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
  distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(Cohort) %>%
  summarise(n_pts = n(), n_active = sum(trt_actv == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_active = round(100 * mean(trt_actv, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>% print()

cat("\nMAO-B use by group (Steady-PD3):\n")
d_steady %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
  group_by(Cohort) %>%
  summarise(n_visits = n(), n_pts = n_distinct(participant_id),
            n_on_maob = sum(ledd_maob > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_on_maob = round(100 * mean(ledd_maob > 0, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            mean_ledd_maob = round(mean(ledd_maob[ledd_maob > 0], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>% print()

cat("\nTreatment arm by group (Steady-PD3, isradipine trial):\n")
d_steady %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
  distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(Cohort) %>%
  summarise(n_pts = n(), n_active = sum(trt_actv == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_active = round(100 * mean(trt_actv, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
            .groups = "drop") %>% print()
```

## Validation Demographics

```{r validation-demographics}
build_validation_demo <- function(df, label) {
  pts <- df %>%
    filter(Cohort %in% c("MC1R PD", "SPD")) %>%
    distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Race_detail = case_when(
      race == "White"                             ~ "White",
      grepl("Asian", race, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "Asian",
      grepl("Black", race, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "Black",
      grepl("Multi", race, ignore.case = TRUE)    ~ "Multiracial",
      TRUE                                        ~ "Unknown"
    ))

  fu <- df %>%
    filter(participant_id %in% pts$participant_id) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(fu = max(visit_year) - min(visit_year), .groups = "drop")
  pts <- pts %>% left_join(fu, by = "participant_id")

  n <- nrow(pts)
  pct <- function(x) sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(x, na.rm = TRUE),
                              100 * mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  mean_sd <- function(x) {
    x <- x[!is.na(x)]
    if (length(x) < 2) return("\u2014")
    sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(x), sd(x))
  }

  tibble(
    Characteristic = c(
      "N", "Age at PD onset, years", "Male", "Race", "  White", "  Asian",
      "  Black", "  Unknown", "Average follow-up, years",
      "MDS-UPDRS III at baseline"
    ),
    !!label := c(
      as.character(n),
      mean_sd(pts$Age_onset),
      pct(pts$Sex == "Male"),
      "",
      pct(pts$Race_detail == "White"),
      pct(pts$Race_detail == "Asian"),
      pct(pts$Race_detail == "Black"),
      pct(pts$Race_detail == "Unknown"),
      mean_sd(pts$fu),
      mean_sd(pts$baseline_score)
    )
  )
}


demo_sure3_mc1r <- build_validation_demo(d_sure3 %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R PD"), "Sure-PD3 MC1R PD")
demo_sure3_spd  <- build_validation_demo(d_sure3 %>% filter(Cohort == "SPD"), "Sure-PD3 SPD")


demo_sure2_mc1r <- build_validation_demo(d_sure2 %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R PD"), "Sure-PD2 MC1R PD")
demo_sure2_spd  <- build_validation_demo(d_sure2 %>% filter(Cohort == "SPD"), "Sure-PD2 SPD")


demo_steady_mc1r <- build_validation_demo(d_steady %>% filter(Cohort == "MC1R PD"), "Steady-PD3 MC1R PD")
demo_steady_spd  <- build_validation_demo(d_steady %>% filter(Cohort == "SPD"), "Steady-PD3 SPD")

validation_demo <- demo_sure3_mc1r %>%
  left_join(demo_sure3_spd, by = "Characteristic") %>%
  left_join(demo_sure2_mc1r, by = "Characteristic") %>%
  left_join(demo_sure2_spd, by = "Characteristic") %>%
  left_join(demo_steady_mc1r, by = "Characteristic") %>%
  left_join(demo_steady_spd, by = "Characteristic")

print(knitr::kable(validation_demo, caption = "Validation Cohort Demographics by Genetic Group"))
```

## Primary: MDS-UPDRS III Total {.tabset}

### Sure-PD3

```{r primary-sure3}
comp <- list(test = "MC1R PD", ref = "SPD")

r_sure3 <- run_progression_analysis(d_sure3, "score", comp, baseline_col = "baseline_score",
                                     extra_covs = "trt_actv")

cat(sprintf("Sure-PD3: N=%d (%d obs)\n", r_sure3$n_participants, r_sure3$n_obs))
print(r_sure3$slopes %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))))
```

### Sure-PD2

```{r primary-sure2}
r_sure2 <- run_progression_analysis(d_sure2, "score", comp, baseline_col = "baseline_score",
                                     extra_covs = "trt_actv")

cat(sprintf("Sure-PD2: N=%d (%d obs)\n", r_sure2$n_participants, r_sure2$n_obs))
cat("Goetz-converted scores\n")
print(r_sure2$slopes %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))))
```

### Steady-PD3

```{r primary-steady}
r_steady <- run_progression_analysis(d_steady, "score", comp, baseline_col = "baseline_score",
                                      extra_covs = "trt_actv")

cat(sprintf("Steady-PD3: N=%d (%d obs)\n", r_steady$n_participants, r_steady$n_obs))
print(r_steady$slopes %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))))
```

### Pooled

```{r primary-pooled}
r_pooled <- run_progression_analysis(d_pooled, "score", comp, baseline_col = "baseline_score",
                                      pooled = TRUE, extra_covs = "trt_actv")

cat(sprintf("Pooled (Sure-PD2 + Sure-PD3 + Steady-PD3): N=%d (%d obs)\n",
            r_pooled$n_participants, r_pooled$n_obs))
print(r_pooled$slopes %>%
        mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3))))
```

### Summary

```{r primary-summary}
updrs3_results <- bind_rows(
  r_sure3$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Sure-PD3"),
  r_sure2$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Sure-PD2"),
  r_steady$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Steady-PD3"),
  r_pooled$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Pooled")
)

cat("\nPrimary results:\n")
print(updrs3_results %>%
        dplyr::select(Dataset, Group, N, Slope, Pct_diff, P_value) %>%
        mutate(Slope = round(Slope, 2), P_value = sapply(P_value, format_pval)))
```

## Figure


```{r figure-replication, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}

fdc <- d_pooled %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("SPD", "MC1R PD")) %>%
  mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("SPD", "MC1R PD"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(score), !is.na(baseline_score), !is.na(Age_onset),
         !is.na(Sex), !is.na(Race), !is.na(trt_actv)) %>%
  droplevels()


fig_covars <- c("baseline_score", "Age_onset", "trt_actv")
for (v in c("Sex", "Race", "ledd_maob", "source_cohort"))
  if (v %in% names(fdc) && length(unique(fdc[[v]][!is.na(fdc[[v]])])) >= 2)
    fig_covars <- c(fig_covars, v)

fig_fml <- as.formula(paste("score ~ visit_year * Cohort +", paste(fig_covars, collapse = " + ")))

fig_mod <- tryCatch({
  lme(fig_fml, data = fdc, random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
      weights = varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort),
      control = lmeControl(opt = "optim", maxIter = 500, msMaxIter = 500), na.action = na.omit)
}, error = function(e) {
  tryCatch({
    lme(fig_fml, data = fdc, random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
        control = lmeControl(opt = "optim", maxIter = 500, msMaxIter = 500), na.action = na.omit)
  }, error = function(e2) NULL)
})

if (!is.null(fig_mod)) {
  fe <- fixef(fig_mod)
  tt <- summary(fig_mod)$tTable
  yrs <- seq(0, max(fdc$visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), by = 0.1)


  cov_val <- 0
  for (cv in fig_covars) {
    if (cv %in% names(fe) && is.numeric(fdc[[cv]])) {
      cov_val <- cov_val + fe[cv] * mean(fdc[[cv]], na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  }


  int_nm <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)[1]

  pg <- data.frame(
    visit_year = rep(yrs, 2),
    Cohort = factor(rep(c("SPD", "MC1R PD"), each = length(yrs)), levels = c("SPD", "MC1R PD")))
  pg$predicted <- ifelse(
    pg$Cohort == "SPD",
    fe["(Intercept)"] + fe["visit_year"] * pg$visit_year + cov_val,
    fe["(Intercept)"] + fe["CohortMC1R PD"] +
      (fe["visit_year"] + fe[int_nm]) * pg$visit_year + cov_val)


  vm <- vcov(fig_mod)
  pg$se <- NA
  for (i in 1:nrow(pg)) {
    t <- pg$visit_year[i]
    if (pg$Cohort[i] == "SPD") {
      vp <- vm["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + t^2*vm["visit_year","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["(Intercept)","visit_year"]
    } else {
      vp <- vm["(Intercept)","(Intercept)"] + vm["CohortMC1R PD","CohortMC1R PD"] +
        t^2*vm["visit_year","visit_year"] + t^2*vm[int_nm, int_nm] +
        2*vm["(Intercept)","CohortMC1R PD"] + 2*t*vm["(Intercept)","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["(Intercept)", int_nm] + 2*t*vm["CohortMC1R PD","visit_year"] +
        2*t*vm["CohortMC1R PD", int_nm] + 2*t^2*vm["visit_year", int_nm]
    }
    pg$se[i] <- sqrt(max(vp, 0))
  }
  pg$ci_lo <- pg$predicted - 1.96 * pg$se
  pg$ci_hi <- pg$predicted + 1.96 * pg$se


  obs <- fdc %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year * 4) / 4) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, vy_r) %>%
    summarise(mn = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
              se = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n >= 5)

  n_tbl <- fdc %>%
    mutate(vy_r = round(visit_year * 2) / 2) %>%
    group_by(Cohort, time = vy_r) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")

  ref_slope <- fe["visit_year"]
  mc1r_slope <- ref_slope + fe[int_nm]
  bd <- fe[int_nm]
  bd_se <- sqrt(diag(vm))[int_nm]
  pv <- tt[int_nm, "p-value"]
  pct <- round(100 * bd / abs(ref_slope), 1)
  n_spd <- n_distinct(fdc$participant_id[fdc$Cohort == "SPD"])
  n_mc1r <- n_distinct(fdc$participant_id[fdc$Cohort == "MC1R PD"])

  stat_label <- sprintf(
    "Non-carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br><i>MC1R</i> carriers: %0.2f pts/yr (n=%d)<br>\u03b2=%0.2f (%0.2f, %0.2f); %+0.1f%% faster; p=%s",
    ref_slope, n_spd, mc1r_slope, n_mc1r,
    bd, bd - 1.96*bd_se, bd + 1.96*bd_se,
    pct, sprintf("%.2f", pv))

  cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")
  x_max <- max(fdc$visit_year) + 0.1

  p_main <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = pg, aes(visit_year, ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi, fill = Cohort), alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_point(data = obs, aes(vy_r, mn, color = Cohort), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(data = obs, aes(vy_r, mn, ymin = mn - 1.96*se, ymax = mn + 1.96*se, color = Cohort),
                  width = 0.05, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_line(data = pg, aes(visit_year, predicted, color = Cohort), linewidth = 1.5) +
    annotate("richtext", x = 0.05, y = max(pg$ci_hi, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
             label = stat_label, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
             size = 3.5, fill = "white", color = "black",
             label.size = 0.5, label.r = unit(0.15, "lines"),
             family = "sans") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, 0.5), limits = c(0, x_max),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 5), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    labs(x = "Years since Baseline", y = "MDS-UPDRS III Score",
         title = "Pooled Replication Cohort (SURE-PD2 + SURE-PD3 + STEADY-PD III)") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.15),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", vjust = -14),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 10, -5, 10)) +
    guides(fill = "none")

  n_tbl$Cohort <- factor(n_tbl$Cohort, levels = c("MC1R PD", "SPD"))
  p_n <- ggplot(n_tbl, aes(x = time, y = Cohort, label = n)) +
    geom_text(aes(color = Cohort), size = 3.5, fontface = "plain") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 4, 1), limits = c(0, x_max),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = c("MC1R PD" = expression(paste(italic("MC1R"), " carriers")),
                                "SPD" = "Non-carriers")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_void(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1, face = "bold", color = "gray30",
                                     margin = margin(r = 10)),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = -0.15,
                                    color = "gray30", margin = margin(b = 3)),
          plot.margin = margin(-5, 10, 5, 60)) +
    ggtitle("No. of participants")

  fig <- p_main / p_n + plot_layout(heights = c(8, 1))

  print(fig)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Figure_Replication_Progression.png"), fig, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Figure_Replication_Progression.pdf"), fig, width = 8, height = 6, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

## Supplemental: Person-Level Slope Distributions

```{r slope-density-replication, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(fig_mod)) {
  re <- ranef(fig_mod)
  fe <- fixef(fig_mod)
  int_nm <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)[1]

  slope_df <- data.frame(
    participant_id = rownames(re),
    random_slope = re$visit_year
  ) %>%
    left_join(fdc %>% distinct(participant_id, Cohort), by = "participant_id") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Cohort)) %>%
    mutate(person_slope = ifelse(
      Cohort == "SPD",
      fe["visit_year"] + random_slope,
      fe["visit_year"] + fe[int_nm] + random_slope
    ))

  cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

  p_dens <- ggplot(slope_df, aes(x = person_slope, fill = Cohort, color = Cohort)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(data = slope_df %>% group_by(Cohort) %>% summarise(mn = mean(person_slope)),
               aes(xintercept = mn, color = Cohort), linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed",
               show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
    labs(x = "Estimated Person-Level Slope (MDS-UPDRS III pts/yr)",
         y = "Density",
         title = "Replication Cohort: Distribution of Individual Motor Progression Rates") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA, linetype = 0)),
           color = "none")

  print(p_dens)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_Density_Replication.png"), p_dens, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_Density_Replication.pdf"), p_dens, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

```{r slope-vs-treatment-replication, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(fig_mod) && exists("slope_df")) {
  trt_raw <- bind_rows(
    sure3_combined %>% mutate(source = "Sure-PD3"),
    sure2_combined %>% mutate(source = "Sure-PD2"),
    steady_combined %>% mutate(source = "Steady-PD3")
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(genetic_group), genetic_group != "Excluded") %>%
    mutate(
      on_levo = trimws(on_levodopa) == "Yes",
      on_da   = if ("on_dopamine_agonist" %in% names(.))
                  coalesce(trimws(on_dopamine_agonist) == "Yes", FALSE) else FALSE,
      visit_year = as.numeric(visit_month) / 12
    )

  trt_time <- trt_raw %>%
    filter(on_levo | on_da) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(trt_year = min(visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  max_fu <- trt_raw %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    summarise(max_year = max(visit_year, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  slope_trt <- slope_df %>%
    left_join(trt_time, by = "participant_id") %>%
    left_join(max_fu, by = "participant_id") %>%
    mutate(
      started_trt = !is.na(trt_year),
      time_to_trt = coalesce(trt_year, max_year)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(time_to_trt))

  slope_trt <- slope_trt %>%
    mutate(group_label = interaction(
      ifelse(Cohort == "MC1R PD", "<i>MC1R</i> carriers", "Non-carriers"),
      ifelse(started_trt, "Started treatment", "Censored"),
      sep = " - "
    ))

  grp_cols <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment" = "#B2182B",
                "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Censored" = "#B2182B",
                "Non-carriers - Started treatment" = "#2166AC",
                "Non-carriers - Censored" = "#2166AC")
  grp_shapes <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment" = 16,
                   "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Censored" = 1,
                   "Non-carriers - Started treatment" = 16,
                   "Non-carriers - Censored" = 1)
  grp_order <- c("<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Started treatment", "<i>MC1R</i> carriers - Censored",
                  "Non-carriers - Started treatment", "Non-carriers - Censored")
  slope_trt$group_label <- factor(slope_trt$group_label, levels = grp_order)

  p_trt <- ggplot(slope_trt, aes(x = time_to_trt, y = person_slope,
                                  color = group_label, shape = group_label)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(data = slope_trt, aes(x = time_to_trt, y = person_slope, color = Cohort),
                method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed",
                show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(grp_cols, "SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B"),
                       breaks = grp_order, name = NULL) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = grp_shapes, breaks = grp_order, name = NULL) +
    labs(x = "Time to Treatment Initiation (years)",
         y = "Estimated Person-Level Slope (pts/yr)",
         title = "Replication Cohort: Progression Rate vs. Time to Treatment Initiation") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
          legend.text = element_markdown(),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3))

  print(p_trt)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_vs_Treatment_Replication.png"), p_trt, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Slope_vs_Treatment_Replication.pdf"), p_trt, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
}
```

```{r attrition-replication, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
att <- fdc %>%
  mutate(qtr = floor(visit_year * 4) / 4) %>%
  group_by(Cohort, qtr) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(participant_id), .groups = "drop")

cols <- c("SPD" = "#2166AC", "MC1R PD" = "#B2182B")

p_att <- ggplot(att, aes(x = qtr, y = n, color = Cohort, group = Cohort)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols, labels = c("SPD" = "Non-carriers", "MC1R PD" = "<i>MC1R</i> carriers")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 3, 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1))) +
  labs(x = "Year of Follow-up (pre-dopaminergic visits only)", y = "Participants with Assessments",
       title = "Replication Cohort: Sample Size by Quarter-Year of Follow-up") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_markdown(),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3))

print(p_att)
ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Attrition_Replication.png"), p_att, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 600)
ggsave(file.path(config$output_dir, "Supplemental_Attrition_Replication.pdf"), p_att, width = 8, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
```

## Domain Subscores

```{r subscores}
sub_sure3 <- run_subscore_analysis(d_sure3, subscore_vars, comp, "Sure-PD3",
                                    extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sub_sure2 <- run_subscore_analysis(d_sure2, subscore_vars, comp, "Sure-PD2",
                                    extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sub_steady <- run_subscore_analysis(d_steady, subscore_vars, comp, "Steady-PD3",
                                     extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sub_pooled <- run_subscore_analysis(d_pooled, subscore_vars, comp, "Pooled",
                                     pooled = TRUE, extra_covs = "trt_actv")

subscore_table <- bind_rows(sub_sure3, sub_sure2, sub_steady, sub_pooled)

if (nrow(subscore_table) > 0) {
  cat("Sure-PD2 missing 6 MDS-only items: toe tapping, freezing,\n")
  cat("      kinetic tremor, and rest tremor constancy items unavailable.\n\n")
  print(subscore_table %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4))) %>%
          dplyr::select(Dataset, Subscore, N_ref, N_MC1R, SPD_slope, MC1R_slope,
                        Diff, Pct_diff, P_value) %>%
          arrange(Dataset, P_value))
}
```

## Secondary: Co-carrier Adjusted

```{r secondary-data}
build_secondary_data <- function(combined_df, cohort_label) {
  # Steady-PD3 uses Sex not sex
  if (!"sex" %in% names(combined_df) && "Sex" %in% names(combined_df)) {
    combined_df <- combined_df %>% rename(sex = Sex)
  }

  vis <- combined_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(genetic_group)) %>%
    mutate(
      on_levodopa_flag = (trimws(on_levodopa) == "Yes"),
      on_maob_flag     = (trimws(on_other_pd_medications) == "Yes"),
      on_da_flag       = if ("on_dopamine_agonist" %in% names(.))
                           coalesce(trimws(on_dopamine_agonist) == "Yes", FALSE) else FALSE
    ) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    arrange(visit_month) %>%
    mutate(
      first_levo_month = min(visit_month[on_levodopa_flag == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE),
      first_levo_month = if_else(is.infinite(first_levo_month), NA_real_, first_levo_month),
      first_da_month   = min(visit_month[on_da_flag == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE),
      first_da_month   = if_else(is.infinite(first_da_month), NA_real_, first_da_month)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      (is.na(first_levo_month) | visit_month < first_levo_month) &
      (is.na(first_da_month)   | visit_month < first_da_month)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      visit_year     = as.numeric(visit_month) / 12,
      score          = as.numeric(mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score),
      Sex            = factor(sex, levels = c("Female", "Male")),
      Race           = factor(if_else(race == "White", "White", "Other"),
                              levels = c("White", "Other")),
      trt_actv       = as.numeric(trt_actv),
      MC1R_any       = as.integer(grepl("MC1R", genetic_group)),
      lrrk2_carrier  = as.integer(grepl("LRRK2", genetic_group)),
      gba_carrier    = as.integer(grepl("GBA", genetic_group)),
      Cohort         = factor(if_else(MC1R_any == 1, "MC1R PD", "Non-MC1R"),
                              levels = c("Non-MC1R", "MC1R PD")),
      ledd_maob = coalesce(as.numeric(ledd_MAO_B), 0),
      source_cohort  = cohort_label
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(score), !is.na(visit_year), !is.na(Age_onset)) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(baseline_score = first(score, order_by = visit_year)) %>%
    ungroup()

  has_subscores <- all(c("bradykinesia_score", "rigidity_score", "tremor_score",
                          "bulbar_score", "axial_score") %in% names(vis))
  if (!has_subscores) vis <- compute_subscores(vis)
  vis
}

d_sure3_sec <- build_secondary_data(sure3_combined, "Sure-PD3")
d_sure2_sec <- build_secondary_data(sure2_combined, "Sure-PD2")
d_steady_sec <- build_secondary_data(steady_combined, "Steady-PD3")
d_pooled_sec <- bind_rows(d_sure3_sec, d_sure2_sec, d_steady_sec) %>%
  mutate(source_cohort = factor(source_cohort, levels = c("Sure-PD3", "Sure-PD2", "Steady-PD3")))

for (lbl in c("Sure-PD3", "Sure-PD2", "Steady-PD3", "Pooled")) {
  dd <- switch(lbl, "Sure-PD3" = d_sure3_sec, "Sure-PD2" = d_sure2_sec,
               "Steady-PD3" = d_steady_sec, "Pooled" = d_pooled_sec)
  pts <- dd %>% distinct(participant_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("%s sec: %d pts (%d MC1R-any, %d non-MC1R, %d LRRK2, %d GBA)\n",
              lbl, nrow(pts), sum(pts$MC1R_any), sum(!pts$MC1R_any),
              sum(pts$lrrk2_carrier), sum(pts$gba_carrier)))
}
```

```{r secondary-fn}
run_secondary_analysis <- function(data, outcome_col, baseline_col = NULL,
                                    extra_covs = NULL, pooled = FALSE) {
  ad <- data %>%
    mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Non-MC1R", "MC1R PD")))

  if (is.null(baseline_col)) {
    ad <- ad %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      mutate(baseline_score = first(!!sym(outcome_col), order_by = visit_year)) %>%
      ungroup()
    baseline_col <- "baseline_score"
  }

  covs <- paste(baseline_col, "+ Age_onset + Sex + Race + lrrk2_carrier + gba_carrier + ledd_maob")
  if (!is.null(extra_covs)) covs <- paste(covs, "+", paste(extra_covs, collapse = " + "))
  if (pooled) covs <- paste(covs, "+ source_cohort")

  req <- c(outcome_col, "visit_year", baseline_col, "Age_onset",
           "Sex", "Race", "Cohort", "participant_id", "lrrk2_carrier", "gba_carrier", "ledd_maob", extra_covs)
  if (pooled) req <- c(req, "source_cohort")
  ad <- ad %>% filter(if_all(all_of(req), ~ !is.na(.)))

  if (nrow(ad) < 20)
    return(list(success = FALSE, error = "Insufficient data"))

  all_covs <- c(baseline_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race", "lrrk2_carrier", "gba_carrier", "ledd_maob", extra_covs)
  if (pooled) all_covs <- c(all_covs, "source_cohort")
  all_covs <- drop_invariant_covs(ad, all_covs)
  covs <- paste(all_covs, collapse = " + ")

  fml <- as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ visit_year * Cohort + %s", outcome_col, covs))

  mr <- safe_lme(formula = fml, data = ad,
                 random = ~ visit_year + 1 | participant_id,
                 weights = nlme::varIdent(form = ~ 1 | Cohort))

  slopes <- extract_lme_slopes(mr, "Non-MC1R", ad)
  slopes$Comparison <- "MC1R PD vs Non-MC1R (co-carrier adj)"

  list(success = mr$success, model = mr$model, slopes = slopes,
       n_obs = nrow(ad), n_participants = n_distinct(ad$participant_id))
}

run_secondary_subscores <- function(data, subscore_vars, label = "",
                                     extra_covs = NULL, pooled = FALSE) {
  results <- list()
  for (sub in subscore_vars) {
    sub_label <- gsub("_score", "", sub)
    bl_col <- paste0("baseline_", sub)

    sub_data <- data %>%
      mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Non-MC1R", "MC1R PD"))) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[sub]])) %>%
      group_by(participant_id) %>%
      mutate(!!bl_col := first(.data[[sub]], order_by = visit_year)) %>%
      ungroup()

    covs <- paste(bl_col, "+ Age_onset + Sex + Race + lrrk2_carrier + gba_carrier + ledd_maob")
    if (!is.null(extra_covs)) covs <- paste(covs, "+", paste(extra_covs, collapse = " + "))
    if (pooled) covs <- paste(covs, "+ source_cohort")

    req <- c(sub, "visit_year", bl_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race",
             "Cohort", "participant_id", "lrrk2_carrier", "gba_carrier", "ledd_maob", extra_covs)
    if (pooled) req <- c(req, "source_cohort")
    sub_data <- sub_data %>% filter(if_all(all_of(req), ~ !is.na(.)))

    all_sub_covs <- c(bl_col, "Age_onset", "Sex", "Race", "lrrk2_carrier", "gba_carrier", "ledd_maob", extra_covs)
    if (pooled) all_sub_covs <- c(all_sub_covs, "source_cohort")
    all_sub_covs <- drop_invariant_covs(sub_data, all_sub_covs)
    covs <- paste(all_sub_covs, collapse = " + ")

    fml <- as.formula(paste0(sub, " ~ visit_year * Cohort + ", covs))

    fit <- safe_subscore_fit(fml, sub_data)

    if (!is.null(fit)) {
      fe <- nlme::fixef(fit); vm <- vcov(fit); fe_se <- sqrt(diag(vm))
      int_nm <- grep("visit_year:Cohort|Cohort.*:visit_year", names(fe), value = TRUE)
      if (length(int_nm) == 1) {
        ref_slope <- fe["visit_year"]; ref_se <- fe_se["visit_year"]
        bd <- fe[int_nm]; bse <- fe_se[int_nm]
        mc1r_slope <- ref_slope + bd
        var_mc1r <- vm["visit_year","visit_year"] + vm[int_nm,int_nm] + 2*vm["visit_year",int_nm]
        mc1r_se <- sqrt(max(0, var_mc1r))

        results[[sub_label]] <- data.frame(
          Subscore = sub_label, Dataset = label,
          N_ref  = n_distinct(sub_data$participant_id[sub_data$Cohort == "Non-MC1R"]),
          N_MC1R = n_distinct(sub_data$participant_id[sub_data$Cohort == "MC1R PD"]),
          Ref_slope = ref_slope, MC1R_slope = mc1r_slope,
          Diff = bd, Diff_SE = bse,
          Diff_CI_lower = bd - 1.96*bse, Diff_CI_upper = bd + 1.96*bse,
          Pct_diff = calc_pct_diff(bd, ref_slope),
          P_value = summary(fit)$tTable[int_nm, "p-value"],
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
  if (length(results) > 0) do.call(rbind, results)
  else data.frame()
}
```

```{r secondary-models}
sec_sure3 <- run_secondary_analysis(d_sure3_sec, "score", "baseline_score",
                                     extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_sure2 <- run_secondary_analysis(d_sure2_sec, "score", "baseline_score",
                                     extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_steady <- run_secondary_analysis(d_steady_sec, "score", "baseline_score",
                                      extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_pooled <- run_secondary_analysis(d_pooled_sec, "score", "baseline_score",
                                      extra_covs = "trt_actv", pooled = TRUE)

sec_results <- bind_rows(
  sec_sure3$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Sure-PD3"),
  sec_sure2$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Sure-PD2"),
  sec_steady$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Steady-PD3"),
  sec_pooled$slopes %>% mutate(Dataset = "Pooled")
)

cat("Secondary: Total UPDRS III\n")
print(sec_results %>%
        dplyr::select(Dataset, Comparison, Group, N, Slope, Pct_diff, P_value) %>%
        mutate(Slope = round(Slope, 2), P_value = sapply(P_value, format_pval)))
```

```{r secondary-subscores}
sec_sub_sure3 <- run_secondary_subscores(d_sure3_sec, subscore_vars, "Sure-PD3",
                                          extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_sub_sure2 <- run_secondary_subscores(d_sure2_sec, subscore_vars, "Sure-PD2",
                                          extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_sub_steady <- run_secondary_subscores(d_steady_sec, subscore_vars, "Steady-PD3",
                                           extra_covs = "trt_actv")
sec_sub_pooled <- run_secondary_subscores(d_pooled_sec, subscore_vars, "Pooled",
                                           extra_covs = "trt_actv", pooled = TRUE)

sec_subscore_table <- bind_rows(sec_sub_sure3, sec_sub_sure2, sec_sub_steady, sec_sub_pooled)

if (nrow(sec_subscore_table) > 0) {
  cat("\nSecondary: Subscores\n")
  print(sec_subscore_table %>%
          mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 4))) %>%
          dplyr::select(Dataset, Subscore, Ref_slope, MC1R_slope, Diff, Pct_diff, P_value) %>%
          arrange(Dataset, P_value))
}
```

## Output

```{r output}
fmt <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & matches("Slope|Beta|SE|CI|Diff"), ~ round(., 3)),
           across(where(is.numeric) & matches("P_value|Pct"), ~ round(., 4)))
}

wb <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb, "Demographics"); writeData(wb, "Demographics", validation_demo)
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3", fmt(updrs3_results))
if (nrow(subscore_table) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores"); writeData(wb, "UPDRS3_Subscores", fmt(subscore_table))
}
addWorksheet(wb, "Secondary_Total"); writeData(wb, "Secondary_Total", fmt(sec_results))
if (nrow(sec_subscore_table) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "Secondary_Subscores"); writeData(wb, "Secondary_Subscores", fmt(sec_subscore_table))
}

out_file <- file.path(config$output_dir,
                      paste0("MC1R_SurePD_Validation_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx"))
saveWorkbook(wb, out_file, overwrite = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("\n%s\n", out_file))
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
